  libavcodec     62. 28.100 / 62. 28.100
  libavformat    62. 12.100 / 62. 12.100
  libavdevice    62.  3.100 / 62.  3.100
  libavfilter    11. 14.100 / 11. 14.100

  libswresample   6.  3.100 /  6.  3.100
